title: Improve social links, admin panel behavior, and gallery upload logic

requirements.text: The Instagram social icon link must open https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar in a new tab using rel='noopener noreferrer'. Ensure it works both from the social icons section and any other Instagram button/link in the app.

quotes: function goToInsta(){ const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = "https://instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar"; a.target = "_blank"; a.rel = "noopener noreferrer";

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Instagram icon/button opens https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar in a new tab.
The link uses target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'.
No broken or missing Instagram links exist anywhere in the UI.

requirements.text: The WhatsApp social icon link must open https://wa.me/917665854193?text=Hello%20Mudit%20Sharma in a new tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the WhatsApp icon opens the correct WhatsApp link with pre-filled message 'Hello Mudit Sharma'.
Link opens in a new tab.

requirements.text: The hidden admin panel must be triggered by a double-click (two rapid taps within 500ms) on the logo. The double-click detection must reset the tap count after 500ms to prevent accidental triggers.

quotes: logo.addEventListener("click", function() { tapCount++; if (tapCount === 2) { adminPanel.style.display = "block"; tapCount = 0; } setTimeout(() => tapCount = 0, 500); });

acceptanceCriteria: Double-clicking (two taps within 500ms) on the logo reveals the admin login panel.
A single click does not reveal the admin panel.
The tap counter resets after 500ms of inactivity.

requirements.text: Admin login must validate against username 'Deepak Kumawat' and password 'Kinnu*0613'. On success, show an upload section. On failure, display an 'Invalid Credentials' error message.

quotes: if (user === "Deepak Kumawat" && pass === "Kinnu*0613") { document.getElementById("uploadSection").style.display = "block"; alert("Login Successful"); } else { alert("Invalid Credentials"); }

acceptanceCriteria: Entering username 'Deepak Kumawat' and password 'Kinnu*0613' grants access and shows the upload section.
Any other credentials show an 'Invalid Credentials' error.
The upload section is hidden by default before login.

requirements.text: The admin image upload feature must allow selecting a local image file and display it in the gallery immediately after upload, without requiring a page reload. The upload reads the file as a data URL and appends it to the gallery.

quotes: function uploadImage() { const input = document.getElementById("imageUpload"); ... const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { const img = document.createElement("img"); img.src = e.target.result; gallery.appendChild(img); } reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]); }

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting an image file and clicking Upload immediately adds the image to the gallery section.
If no file is selected, nothing happens.

requirements.text: Display a QR code section on the main page with label 'Scan QR to Visit Instagram' linking to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar using the QR image URL: https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar

quotes: Scan QR to Visit Instagram

acceptanceCriteria: A QR code image is visible on the page with the heading 'Scan QR to Visit Instagram'.
The QR code resolves to https://www.instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar when scanned.
The QR image is loaded from the correct API URL.

constraints: Admin credentials must remain exactly: username = 'Deepak Kumawat', password = 'Kinnu*0613'.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the overall visual theme or color palette.
Adding new backend data models or API endpoints.
Implementing real server-side image persistence (uploads remain client-side/in-memory).
Adding new pages or routes beyond what already exists.
